modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: How to add Quick Parts in a Word document?

full_description_text: I need help. I want to add a Quick Part. I don’t know how to do it in my Word document. Please tell me how.
short_description: How to add Quick Parts in a Word document?
description: I need help. I want to add a Quick Part. I don’t know how to do it in my Word document. Please tell me how.
